item.title: Namibia onshore well test set to begin within weeks
item.description: Critical operations a step nearer on ReconAfrica's onshore Kavango West-1X exploration well

item.title: Petrobras plans to boost production capacity at eighth Buzios FPSO
item.description: P-79 FPSO started operations in Santos basin pre-salt field earlier this month

item.title: Opec and IEA publish conflicting views on oil demand destruction
item.description: Opec's optimistic demand outlook is rejected by IEA while both warn of accelerating stockpile draws

item.title: Petrobras approaching target reservoir in closely-watched Morpho well
item.description: Company has another eight wells to drill in Brazil's northern equatorial margin

item.title: TotalEnergies and Chevron to drill key Nigeria exploration and appraisal wells
item.description: Akpo Far East is exploration target while Egina South and Ikija discoveries will be appraised, as Preowei studies continue

item.title: King Charles unveils new UK legislation to bolster energy security
item.description: Long-awaited bill sets out the government's plans to transition away from fossil fuels and bolster energy security

item.title: Major shareholder sells parcel of Aker BP shares
item.description: Lundin-linked shareholder still retains about 13.3% of Aker BP

item.title: BP pushes ahead with Azerbaijan projects to boost gas output
item.description: Production from South Caucasus nation already accounts for one fifth of BP's total global hydrocarbon output

item.title: TotalEnergies clinches deal to explore frontier North Africa basin
item.description: Supermajor looks to explore large area in Egypt's Herodotus basin

item.title: Modec reaps rewards of new FPSO projects
item.description: Japanese company has four major FPSO projects under construction

item.title: Willis eyes new insurance to help unlock CCS development
item.description: New integrated insurance for carbon capture and storage infrastructure could unlock project financing, says provider

item.title: Odfjell over the moon about deepwater rig demand
item.description: Optimism over demand scenario in Norway and lack of new semisub supply

item.title: Trump visit may revive China’s purchases of US energy
item.description: US president scheduled to hold talks with the Chinese President Xi Jinping on Thursday and Friday

item.title: Genting divests stake in Indonesia's first floating LNG project
item.description: Rukun Raharja comes onboard ahead of expected 2027 start-up

item.title: Santos greenlights latest Oceania gas project
item.description: Agogo tie-in will provide feedstock for PNG LNG

item.title: Santos seeks rig for drilling offshore Australia
item.description: Bedout sub-basin campaign will test new play concepts

item.title: Oil to stay above $100 per barrel in May and June as inventories fall: EIA
item.description: Worldwide stockpiles dropped by 8.5 million bpd in second quarter

item.title: Venture Global shares jump after sharp rise in 2026 profit forecast
item.description: US LNG exporter reports steep increase in revenues in first quarter as volumes surge

item.title: TotalEnergies reignites upstream Syria interest
item.description: Supermajor links up with QatarEnergy and ConocoPhillips to target offshore block

item.title: Argentina’s second largest shale player raises production guidance
item.description: Vista Energy also increased planned investments for the 2026-2028 period

item.title: Petrobras profits fall despite favourable oil prices and exchange rate
item.description: Brazilian company had record hydrocarbon production in first quarter of 2026

item.title: Halliburton gears up as industry warms to oilfield AI
item.description: Rapid technological changes promise big gains in efficiency but require veterans to place trust in the machines

item.title: Which contractors are lining up to bid for Petrobras’ Albacora FPSO?
item.description: Brazilian state-controlled oil company to welcome offers for P-88 FPSO in late July

item.title: Namibia grants extension to licence in alluring basin
item.description: Namcor-operated acreage is adjacent to block TotalEnergies and Petrobras recently farmed into

item.title: Norwegian driller confirms new contracts in UK and India
item.description: Dolphin finalises deal with Harbour, and gets a short extension in India

item.title: Odfjell updates on deepwater rig that dropped its BOP
item.description: Deepsea Atlantic is contracted to Adura in the UK

item.title: Operator works to restore capacity at one of world’s largest gas plants damaged by Iran attacks
item.description: Abu Dhabi's Habshan complex is one of the largest gas processing facilities in the world, with a combined capacity of more than 6.1 billion cubic feet per day of gas

item.title: ‘Energy hub for decades to come’: BP's big plans for Caspian stronghold
item.description: Shielded from Middle East related disruption, UK supermajor quietly expanding portfolio in the Caspian Sea

item.title: ‘Energy hub for decades to come’: BP's big plans for Caspian stronghold
item.description: Shielded from Middle East related disruption, UK supermajor quietly expanding portfolio in the Caspian Sea

item.title: Lloyd grants AiP for new Chinese-designed FPSO
item.description: Wison designs new FPSO for harsh environment
